description: IANA example domain. Minimal, standards-compliant HTML with almost no styling. Good baseline test.
The first ever website. Pure semantic HTML, no CSS, no JS. Tests raw HTML parsing.
Intentionally minimal HTML page. Tests basic document structure with almost zero complexity.
CNN's text-only lite site. Simple semantic HTML, minimal styling, lots of links.
Mozilla's blog. Clean WordPress-based markup with articles, headers, and navigation.
Famously minimal HTML. Dense link structure, basic tables, old-school markup.
Hacker News. Table-based layout, minimal CSS, nested comment structure, pagination.
Wikipedia portal page. Multilingual links, search form, clean semantic structure.
Wikipedia article page. Complex tables, nested headings, infoboxes, footnotes, TOC navigation.
Scraping sandbox. Fake e-commerce with product cards, pagination, categories, ratings, prices.
Scraping sandbox with login form, pagination, tags, and quote/author data extraction.
Scraping practice site with tables of country data, sports stats, and paginated lists.
Web Scraper test e-commerce site. Product cards, categories, pagination, varied layouts.
HTTP request/response testing service. Forms for various HTTP methods, structured API docs.
HTTPBin form page. HTML form with various input types that POSTs data. Good form parsing test.
UK Government portal. Gold standard for semantic HTML, ARIA landmarks, accessible navigation.
GOV.UK search results page. Form with filters, faceted navigation, result list, pagination.
US Government portal. Clean semantic HTML, USWDS design system, good heading hierarchy.
Census data tables index. Links to complex data tables, nested navigation, government structure.
W3C homepage. Standards-compliant HTML, proper semantic structure, accessible navigation.
WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices Guide. Complex ARIA patterns, landmark roles, accessible widgets.
MDN HTML element reference. Deep heading hierarchy, code blocks, navigation sidebar, breadcrumbs.
Python standard library docs. Sphinx-generated, deep nested TOC, cross-references, search form.
Amazon search results. Dense product grid, filters, prices, ratings, pagination, messy HTML.
eBay search results. Product listings, filtering sidebar, sorting, pagination, varied card layouts.
Etsy search results. Product grid with images, prices, reviews, seller info, filter sidebar.
Target grocery category page. Product cards, faceted filters, sorting, delivery options.
BBC News. Semantic article markup, nested sections, images, timestamps, navigation regions.
NPR homepage. Good semantic HTML, article cards, audio player links, topic navigation.
Reuters homepage. News article grid, category navigation, timestamps, structured data markup.
GitHub Explore page. Repository cards, topic tags, trending lists, navigation, good a11y.
GitHub search results. Filters, sorting, repository cards with stats, pagination.
Stack Overflow questions list. Tabs, filters, question summaries, tags, vote counts, pagination.
NYT homepage. Complex grid layout, article hierarchy, section breaks, multimedia embeds.
IMDB Top 250 movies. Large table/list, ratings, links, structured data, sorting.
Accessibility checker tool. Clean accessible markup, form inputs, good ARIA usage.
Scope disability charity. WCAG AAA target, excellent semantic HTML, accessible forms and navigation.
Google's HTML learning resource. Clean structured content, code examples, navigation, breadcrumbs.
Patagonia product listings. Accessible e-commerce, filter/sort, product grid, good ARIA labels.
Social Security Administration. Government site with forms, tables, USWDS components, good a11y.
IRS forms page. Search form, filterable table of forms, document links, structured navigation.
W3C HTML Validator. File upload form, URL input, textarea for HTML, radio buttons, options.
Google Advanced Search. Complex form with multiple text inputs, dropdowns, and fieldsets.
DuckDuckGo search. Clean search form, minimal HTML, privacy-focused, accessible.
Booking.com. Complex search form with date pickers, dropdowns, autocomplete, filters.
Web-scraping.dev product page. E-commerce test site with reviews, variants, and structured data.
DataTables example. Interactive HTML table with sorting, pagination, search, complex thead/tbody.
